name: CheckConstraint
description:
Characteristics of a SITE COMPONENT representing a process, such as check-in, security
screening, ticket control or immigration, that may potentially incur a time penalty that should be allowed for when journey planning. Used to mark PATH LINKs to determine transit routes through interchanges.

attributes.name: CheckDirection
attributes.description: For CHECK CONSTRAINTs associated with PATH LINKs, the direction in which the check applies. Forwards = from/to, backwards = to/from. For Check constraints associated with an external ENTRANCE, forwards is into the SITE, backwards is out of the SITE.

attributes.name: CheckProcess
attributes.description: Type of process that may occur at CHECK CONSTRAINT.

attributes.description: Type of crowding that may slow use of CHECK CONSTRAINT.

attributes.name: delays
attributes.description: Delays for CHECK CONSTRAINT .process.

attributes.description: Throughput for CHECK CONSTRAINT.

name: RampEquipment
description: Specialisation of PLACE ACCESS EQUIPMENT for ramps (provides ramp characteristics like length, gradient, etc.).

attributes.name: Length
attributes.description: Length of ramp in metres. In the case of a mobile ramp associated with a vehicle this element is used to convey the length the ramp needs to be extended from the vehicle. This indicates the minimally necessary width of the Quay.

attributes.name: MaximumLoad
attributes.description: Maximum load in kilograms. Mainly used for mobile ramps.

attributes.name: Gradient
attributes.description: Gradient of ramp in degrees.

attributes.description: Whether ramp has tactile guidance strips.

attributes.description: Whether ramp has visual guidance bands or guidance strips.

attributes.name: Temporary
attributes.description: Whether ramp is temporary or permanent.

attributes.name: SuitableForCycles
attributes.description: Whether equipment is suitable for cycles.

attributes.name: RestStopDistance
attributes.description: The maximum distance between two resting levels, in metres rounded to the nearest cm. It is recommended to install a rest platform at the bottom and top of each ramp, as well as every 10 metres in the case of a long ramp.

attributes.name: SafetyEdge
attributes.description: Whether there is a wheel guard (side border intended to block the wheel of the wheelchair to prevent falls).

attributes.name: TurningSpace
attributes.description: Position of the manoeuvring space (for wheelchairs).

name: NavigationPath
description: A designated path between two places. May include an ordered sequence of PATH LINKs.

attributes.name: From
attributes.description: Origin end of NAVIGATION PATH. Only needed if detailed PATH LINKs are not given.

attributes.name: To
attributes.description: Destination end of NAVIGATION PATH. Only needed if detailed PATH LINKs not given.

attributes.name: AccessModes
attributes.description: MODEs of access which may used at associated place, e.g. foot access, bicycle access.

attributes.name: summaries
attributes.description: Summaries of access features encountered in path.

attributes.name: TransferDuration
attributes.description: Total time needed to navigate path (May be derived from links).

attributes.name: PublicUse
attributes.description: Whether the component is available for public use or is restricted.

attributes.name: Covered
attributes.description: Whether the component is Indoors or outdoors. Default is Indoors.

attributes.name: Gated
attributes.description: Whether the component is within a gated area or freely accessible without a pass or ticket.

attributes.name: Lighting
attributes.description: Whether the component is lit or not. Default is well Lit.

attributes.name: AllAreasWheelchairAccessible
attributes.description: Whether all areas of the component are wheelchair accessible.

attributes.name: PersonCapacity
attributes.description: Total number of people that component can contain.

attributes.name: Presentation
attributes.description: Presentation defaults for SITE ELEMENT. +V1.2.2

attributes.name: facilities
attributes.description: Facilities available at SITe.

attributes.name: AccessFeatureList
attributes.description: Classification of Overall Accessibility of NAVIGATION PATH.

attributes.description: Classification of Navigation.

attributes.name: pathLinksInSequence
attributes.description: Ordered collection of References to PATH LINKs.

attributes.name: transfers
attributes.description: Access Links that NAVIGATION PATH serves.

inheritedAttributes.name: Distance
inheritedAttributes.description: Overall distance of LINK SEQUENCE. Can be derived from component LINKs.

inheritedAttributes.name: projections
inheritedAttributes.description: PROJECTIONs of LINK SEQUENCE onto another ENTITY or layer.

inheritedAttributes.name: sectionsInSequence

name: StopPlace
description: Version of a named place where public transport may be accessed. May be a building complex (e.g. a station) or an on-street location. Can be a STOP PLACE, VEHICLE MEETING POINT, TAXI RANK.

attributes.name: PublicCode
attributes.description: Short public code for passengers to use when uniquely identifying the stop by SMS and other self-service channels.

attributes.name: OtherTransportModes
attributes.description: Public transport MODES which may be accessed through associated place.

attributes.description: TARIFF ZONEs into which component falls.

attributes.description: Primary MODE of Vehicle transport associated by this component.

attributes.name: BorderCrossing
attributes.description: Whether STOP PLACE is a border crossing, that is a point, at which an international boundary between two countries may be crossed.

attributes.name: unlocalisedEquipments
attributes.description: Items of EQUIPMENT associated with STOP PLACE but not assigned to a point within it. More Localized EQUIPMENT should be included in an EQUIPMENT place.

attributes.name: servedPlaces
attributes.description: TOPOGRAPHICAL PLACEs that the STOP PLACE serves.

attributes.name: mainTerminusForPlaces
attributes.description: TOPOGRAPHICAL PLACEs for which the STOP PLACE is a main terminus. Only certain stations will be deemed the main STOP PLACEs points. For example London has many rail stations but only some are main line terminii. Geographic containment is not necessarily implied For example London Gatwick and, London Stansted airports are not in London, but are designated airports for London. Norwich station is not in Norwich, etc.

attributes.name: Weighting
attributes.description: Default rating of the STOP PLACE for making interchanges.

name: Quay
description:
A place such as platform, stance, or quayside where passengers have access to PT vehicles, Taxi
cars or other means of transportation. A QUAY may contain other sub QUAYs. A child QUAY must be physically
contained within its parent QUAY.

inheritedAttributes.description: Items of EQUIPMENT associated with STOP PLACE but not assigned to a point within it. More Localized EQUIPMENT should be included in an EQUIPMENT place.

inheritedAttributes.description: TOPOGRAPHICAL PLACEs that the STOP PLACE serves.

inheritedAttributes.name: mainTerminusForPlaces
inheritedAttributes.description: TOPOGRAPHICAL PLACEs for which the STOP PLACE is a main terminus. Only certain stations will be deemed the main STOP PLACEs points. For example London has many rail stations but only some are main line terminii. Geographic containment is not necessarily implied For example London Gatwick and, London Stansted airports are not in London, but are designated airports for London. Norwich station is not in Norwich, etc.

attributes.name: ExternalConnectionLinkRef
attributes.description: An alternative  code that uniquely identifies the CONNECTION link Specifically for use in AVMS systems that require an alias, if. For VDV compatibility.

attributes.name: From
attributes.description: Origin end of CONNECTION.

attributes.name: To
attributes.description: Destination end of  CONNECTION.

attributes.name: TransferOnly
attributes.description: Whether  connecting at this stop passengers may only transfer. If true, then they may not enter or exit at the station.

inheritedAttributes.description: Timings for the TRANSFER to use in journey planning, etc.

inheritedAttributes.name: WalkTransferDuration
inheritedAttributes.description: Timings for walking over TRANSFER if different from the JOURNEY PATTERN  transfer duration,

inheritedAttributes.name: BothWays
inheritedAttributes.description: Whether timings and validity applies to both directions (true) or just to the from-to direction of the TRANSFER.

inheritedAttributes.name: TransferMode
inheritedAttributes.description: If a special transfer mode is needed. ACCESS MODE enumeration is also used for the TransferMode.

inheritedAttributes.description: A list of alternative Key values for an element.

name: StopPointInJourneyPattern
description: The use of a SCHEDULED STOP POINT in a specified order. within a JOURNEY PATTERN or SERVICE PATTERN.

attributes.name: OnwardServiceLinkRef
attributes.description: Link that connects this to the next point. Allows to disambiguate if there are multiple SERVICE LINKs between two SERVICE POINTs.

attributes.name: ForAlighting
attributes.description: Whether alighting is allowed at the stop. Default is true.

attributes.name: ForBoarding
attributes.description: Whether boarding is allowed at the stop. Default is true.

attributes.name: AlightingSideInDirectionOfTravel
attributes.description: On which side the vehicle can be alighted on this stop in the direction of travel. This is often not relevant. And it is difficult to define this from the QUAY when the direction of travel is not known.

attributes.name: BoardingSideInDirectionOfTravel
attributes.description: On which side the vehicle can be boarded on this stop in the direction of travel.

attributes.name: OnwardTimingLinkRef
attributes.description: Onward link - used to disambiguate if there are multiple links from the same stop, e.g. as for cloverleaf route topology. If not given explicitly assume there is only one link that connects the two.

attributes.name: IsWaitPoint
attributes.description: Whether point is a wait point.

attributes.name: headways
attributes.description: Wait times for TIMING POINT. There may be different times for different time demands.

attributes.name: WaitTime
attributes.description: Wait time as interval. OPTIMISATION assuming default Time Demand. Use this to declare a single wait time Other wise a list of times for different time demands.

attributes.name: waitTimes
attributes.description: Wait times for TIMING POINT. There may be different times for different time demands.

attributes.name: RequestStop
attributes.description: Whether stop is a request stop for this journey. Default is false.

attributes.name: RequestMethod
attributes.description: Method to Request Stop in this particular service pattern; if none specified, as as per stop.  +V1.1

attributes.name: StopUse
attributes.description: Nature of use of stop, e.g. access, interchange only, or pass through. Default is Access.

attributes.name: BookingArrangements
attributes.description: Booking Arrangements for stop if different from those for SERVICE JOURNEY.

attributes.name: ChangeOfDestinationDisplay
attributes.description: Whether DESTINATION DISPLAY should be updated at this point. If DESTINATION NAME value is different from Previous stop this is implicit.

attributes.name: ChangeOfServiceRequirements
attributes.description: Whether Service Requirements Change at this point.

attributes.description: NOTICEs for POINT IN JOURNEY PATTERN.

attributes.name: vias
attributes.description: Destinations that the SERVICE goes via.

attributes.name: Print
attributes.description: Whether the stop is included in printed media. Default is true. +v1.1

attributes.name: Dynamic
attributes.description: When STOP POINT IN JOURNEY PATTERN is to be publicised in dynamic media. Default is always. +v1.1
